daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Virgo. You're radiating that quiet confidence energy—the kind that makes people actually listen when you speak. Trust those gut feelings; they're louder than usual.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, deep convos are calling. Single? Someone's been lowkey noticing your vibe. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn—no filter needed.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is literally a superpower today. That project or idea you've been sitting on? Now's the moment to bring it forward. Your energy is magnetic.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and calm simultaneously—maybe a walk, yoga, or just stretching while listening to music. Honor what feels good, not what feels obligatory.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about releasing what no longer serves you, Virgo. Mercury's dance suggests clarity is coming, but only after you sit with some uncomfortable truths. Trust the process—your intuition is lowkey fire right now.
weekly.love: Someone's vibes are shifting toward you, but they're moving slowly. If you're already coupled up, this is prime time for deeper convos that actually matter. Single? Stop overthinking and just vibe. Chemistry doesn't need a spreadsheet.
weekly.career: Your ideas are landing differently this week—people are actually listening. Channel this momentum into pitching that thing you've been nervous about. The universe is basically giving you a green light, even if it feels slightly chaotic.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually rest, not just scroll in bed. Move in ways that feel good, not punishing. This week's energy supports gentle flows and genuine recovery over grinding yourself out.
